place: Cape Yamu, Pa Klok, Thalang District, Phuket, Thailand
title: Beachfront Six-Bedroom Villa with 26-Metre Pool over Phang Nga Bay
note: Private chef · 4 staff · airport transfer · beach access
blurb: A six-bedroom beachfront villa on the quiet Cape Yamu headland, its 26-metre infinity pool and outdoor sala framing the turquoise water and island formations of Phang Nga Bay. Home cinema, gym, spa room and private beach access sit within a gated estate of some 6,640 m², with a four-strong team and a private chef, sleeping up to twelve.
detail:
Set on the calm eastern shore of Cape Yamu, this six-bedroom villa looks straight out over the turquoise water and scattered limestone islands of Phang Nga Bay. The architecture pairs a clean, minimalist line with quiet Thai detailing, and almost every room opens to the view — the bay is the constant here, from breakfast through to the long golden light of the afternoon.

A 26-metre infinity pool runs the length of the main terrace toward the water, with an outdoor dining sala for twelve alongside. Private steps lead down to the estate's beach. Inside, six en-suite bedrooms sleep up to twelve, arranged around open living and dining spaces, a fully equipped kitchen, a spa room and an in-villa gym.

Entertainment is built in: a home cinema with projector and surround sound, a bar and lounge wired for music, and satellite televisions throughout. The house sits within a private estate of roughly 6,640 m², of which some 5,000 m² is lawn and garden, giving the whole property a sense of space and seclusion rare so close to the water.

A team of four, including a private chef, runs the day-to-day, with daily housekeeping, turndown and a return airport transfer included; food, massage, laundry and car hire are arranged on request. The estate is gated with 24-hour security, a short drive from Ao Po marina and the restaurants of the island's northeast.

features.l: Private beach access on Phang Nga Bay
Home cinema with projector & surround sound
Gated estate of ≈6,640 m² with private chef
